subcodes.first_line: O beloved of the hearts of the yearning ones, thy missive dated the seventh of Sha'ban was received and brought the utmost gladness and joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب قلوب مشتاقان مکتوب آنجناب مورخه ۷ شعبان وارد و کمال فرح و انبساط حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @apocalyptic imagery, @consolation and comfort
